boundary_binding.action_boundary: May order operations release the tax-exempt sale?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No match on exemption-status class before execution
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Pending TX-44 blocks closure; status-class trap unresolved

final_answer: Source boundary remains open. CERT-JAD-090 indicates TX-44 exemption certificate is pending, despite matching buyer, ship-to, category, and date. STD-JAD-090-P mandates full exemption-status class verification before release. WARN-JAD-090 highlights stale certificates. The action cannot proceed due to the unresolved status-class dependency and pending TX-44, requiring escalation.
